D:\Cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\wheel_leg_simulate.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\wheel_leg_simulate.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\wheel_leg_simulate.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\wheel_leg_simulate.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o wheel_leg_simulate.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libwheel_leg_simulate.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\wheel_leg_simulate.dir\linkLibs.rsp
